stories.title: Thunder 127-114 Spurs — WCF Game 5 (May 26, Paycom Center OKC)
stories.angle: OKC's rotating wall neutralized Wembanyama for the first time in the series, and their bench exploded. The Thunder are one win from the NBA Finals.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
THUNDER UP. 3-2.

OKC 127, SA 114. SGA: 32 pts/9 ast. Caruso: 22 pts in 22 MIN.
Wembanyama: series-low 20 pts on 4-of-15 FG.

One win from the NBA Finals.

#HoopHeroes #ThunderUp #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Alex Caruso had 22 points in 22 minutes last night.

4-of-8 from three. 8-of-8 from the line. 6 assists. 3 steals.

He didn't even start. That's a problem for the Spurs.

#HoopHeroes #ThunderUp #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Thunder Dominate Spurs 127-114 in WCF Game 5, Take 3-2 Series Lead

stories.title: WCF Game 6 TOMORROW — Spurs Facing Elimination at AT&T Center
stories.angle: Elimination game at home. Wembanyama needing a bounce-back. This is must-watch NBA.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
TOMORROW: WCF Game 6. Spurs facing elimination.

AT&T Center, San Antonio | 8:30 PM ET | NBC/Peacock
Thunder lead 3-2. Wembanyama shot 4-of-15 last night.

The series goes home to SA. Will Wemby answer?

#HoopHeroes #PorVida #ThunderUp #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Spurs are 5-2 at home this postseason.

Wembanyama has 41- and 33-point games in this series.
He shot 4-of-15 in Game 5. The AT&T Center crowd wants him back.

Game 6. Thursday. Must-watch NBA.

#HoopHeroes #PorVida #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: WCF Game 6 Preview: Spurs Face Elimination Thursday at AT&T Center

stories.title: Wembanyama Held to Series-Low 20 Points — Thunder's Rotating Wall Works
stories.angle: The blueprint to slow Wembanyama has been found — at least for one game. The league took notes.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Wembanyama finished with 20 points last night.

His path to 20: 4-of-15 from the field (8 pts) + 12 free throws.

OKC threw Hartenstein, Holmgren, Williams AND Caruso at him.
That's a blueprint.

#HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: The Blueprint: How the Thunder Held Wembanyama to His Worst WCF Performance

stories.title: Alex Caruso's Historic 3-Point Surge — On Pace for NBA History
stories.angle: The undrafted veteran is making NBA history — and doing it on the WCF stage.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Alex Caruso: 47.7% from 3 in the playoffs.

Regular season? 29.3%.

That 18.4% jump is ON PACE to be the biggest leap from RS to playoffs in NBA history.

#HoopHeroes #ThunderUp #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: On Pace for NBA History: Alex Caruso's Playoff Three-Point Surge

stories.title: Knicks Rest and Prepare — OG Anunoby Update, Finals Countdown
stories.angle: The Knicks are getting healthier and more dangerous every day. A fully rested OG changes the Finals matchup picture completely.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Knicks haven't played since May 26.

They won't play again until June 3 — 8+ days of rest.
OG Anunoby's hamstring getting more recovery time.

Brunson is averaging 27.8 pts and 6.7 ast this postseason.

#HoopHeroes #Knicks #NBAFinals

article.headline: Eight Days Off and a Healthy OG: The Knicks Are Ready for Their Championship Moment
